prompt.content:
Make the following changes to the RMBS vs MTSI analysis in the merger model and calculate the min required 1 year growth rate of the Pro forma revenue to ensure that the EPS is not dilutive (compared to same RMBS base case)

1.	Update the MTSI’s share price at acquisition to the average dividend adjusted daily closing price between September 2, 2025 and December 31, 2025

2.	Update the % cash consideration to 7.5%; % Bid Premium to 25%; and %SG&A Synergies to 60%

3.	Assumptions for year 1 income statement
a.	Cost of revenue has the same ratio to revenue as the Pro forma income statement 
b.	SG&A expense is the sum of RMBS and MTSI average analyst estimate for 2026 less the synergies
c.	Other operating expenses has the same ratio to revenue as the Pro forma income statement 
d.	Advisory & financing fees reduce to 0 
e.	Net interest income stays fixed in year 1
f.	Tax rate of 24%

Output the 1 year revenue growth rate in 2 decimal places

rubrics.name: States the revenue growth rate is 64.62% (acceptable range 63.97% to 65.27%) (ver_76ea5863c6a544c6bcbc7af424295831)

messages.content: States the revenue growth rate is 64.62% (acceptable range 63.97% to 65.27%).
